Reference Component Set

Main Menu, Hero Banner and Page Components

This reference page demonstrates modular sections that can be reused in future templates, while preserving keyboard access, screen reader labels and clear focus behavior.

Jump to components

Page Components

Important update

Template governance review is scheduled for 30 April. Update requests close two business days prior.

Quick links panel

Reusable card for high-priority actions with consistent spacing and heading hierarchy.

Read component guidance

News tile

Supports short update snippets and structured links for announcements or media highlights.

View news pattern

Resource card

Designed for documents, policy resources and tool references with clear call-to-action labels.

Open resource example
How is this template modular?

Each section is maintained in a separate partial file under dept/modular/components .

How are dropdown menus accessible?

Menus support keyboard controls, proper aria-expanded states and Escape-to-close behavior.

Can we remove JavaScript entirely?

Yes. The page still renders without JS; dropdowns simply remain collapsed and can be expanded in fallback builds.
